heading: Statement required in audit report
label: 153510 Statement required in audit report
text: The corporation shall include in the audit report statement required under a schedule of all contracts requiring payments greater than $10,000 and all payments of compensation or fees at a rate of greater than $10,000 a year.section 10101(b)(1)(B) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15351036:4610(b) (2d sentence cl. (2))., (2d sentence cl. (2)), .Aug. 19, 1964Pub. L. 88–449, § 10(b)78 Stat. 498The word “salaries” is omitted as included in “compensation”.
